pilot_criteria_details.pass_criteria: >=1 hierarchy x >=2 SAE configs with absorption rate. Significantly different from first-letter.

key_changes_from_v1: Using best layer L24 (not L12) for all RAVEL hierarchies
Token position -1 (matching probe training, v1 used -2)
SAE and probe at same layer (no cross-layer measurement)
methodology_notes.probe_quality_caveat: All RAVEL probes are below the strict quality gate (F1 >= 0.90). Best: city-continent L24 F1=0.843. Absorption measurements may be confounded with probe errors.
methodology_notes.absorption_definition: False negative: probe correct on raw residual stream, wrong on SAE-reconstructed activations. Strict: false negative AND main SAE features (top-5 cosine) do not fire.

diagnosis.issue: No RAVEL probe reaches the relaxed quality gate (F1 >= 0.85)
diagnosis.impact: Absorption may be overestimated due to probe errors.
diagnosis.status: Acceptable for pilot -- layer 24 probes are best available.
